steps.title: Interpret increasing by 300%
steps.content:
When a quantity is increased by a percentage, we add that percentage of the original to itself. A 300% increase adds 300% of $x$ to $x$:
$$x + 3x = 4x$$

steps.title: Set up and solve the equation
steps.content:
The problem states the result of this increase is 84:
$$4x = 84$$
Dividing both sides by 4:
$$x = 21$$
A is correct.
